rationale: Both show() and update() queries include .where('userId', userId)
TiktokAccount query uses .where('id', params.accountId) without userId scoping
Both billing and canvas route groups use middleware.rateLimitFinancial()
Billing group uses rateLimit() instead of rateLimitFinancial(); credits group has no rate limiting
privacyLevel and notifySubscribers use .optional() without .nullable() but are clearable fields
